Solana memecoin screener for live pairs

SlimeWire helps traders scan live Solana pairs, fresh launches, chart movement, token metadata, liquidity, alerts, and position context from one stack.

Screener signals

Fresh launches

Watch new pairs before they become crowded.

Market context

MC, liquidity, age, volume, and movement help sort noise from activity.

Token scan

Metadata, links, authority, and visible risk context should be near the chart.

Chart handoff

Open chart and transaction views without losing the selected token.

Telegram alerts

Move between web discovery and group/mobile alerts through @SlimeWiredBot.

Position follow-up

Balances, sells, PnL, TP/SL, and timers matter after the scan turns into a trade.

FAQ

What is a Solana memecoin screener?

A Solana memecoin screener helps traders discover live pairs, fresh launches, market movement, token metadata, chart context, and visible risk signals.

Does SlimeWire screen pump.fun style coins?

Yes. SlimeWire includes fresh launch and pump.fun style discovery pages alongside chart and token-safety context.

Can a screener guarantee profitable trades?

No. A screener can organize live data and surface risk signals, but crypto trading remains risky and users make their own decisions.
